violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Cracked round lids on food containers. -Large square lid cracked/chipped at dish drainer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Dried debris at can opener blade. -Container used for ice bath left with some water in bottom (stored at top of ice machine).--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Dust/debris at walk in cooler and walk in freezer fans.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Some water/floaties in the bottom of the bin used to store the ice scoop. COS-taken to the dish pit immediately. -Dust at hinge of walk in cooler door. -Minimal dust at the walk in cooler fans. -Dust/debris at walk in freezer fans. -Tag/stickers on walk in freezer shelves.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust/debris build up at floor edges and corner in basement, mostly at soda bib rack.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
